introSection: Twist 'n' Shout is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Family Kingdom Amusement Park in South Carolina, USA.

sections.title: Incidents
sections.content:
On August 28, 1999, both a mother and her daughter were killed and two other people were injured when a car climbing the lift hill fell backwards, hitting another car in the station. The two individuals who were killed were sat in the station. The roller coaster was closed immediately and subsequently removed from the pier.

A 45-year-old woman was thrown from the roller coaster, falling to the ground, on July 29, 2006. She was subsequently taken to hospital in a stable condition.

fullText:
Twist 'n' Shout is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Family Kingdom Amusement Park in South Carolina, USA.



Green track and white supports.



On August 28, 1999, both a mother and her daughter were killed and two other people were injured when a car climbing the lift hill fell backwards, hitting another car in the station. The two individuals who were killed were sat in the station. The roller coaster was closed immediately and subsequently removed from the pier.

A 45-year-old woman was thrown from the roller coaster, falling to the ground, on July 29, 2006. She was subsequently taken to hospital in a stable condition.
